summary: Navigation restructure testing complete. New 6-section navigation structure (Dashboard, Finances, Planning, Reports, Calculators, Settings) renders correctly in Personal mode. Adviser mode shows 7 sections including Clients. All key routes accessible. Mobile bottom navigation shows 5 items. Mode switching works via localStorage.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly
Console error in MFASetup component - non-blocking, page still loads

critical_code_review_comments: Navigation restructure successful - 6 clean sections in Personal mode, 7 in Adviser mode
Section icons (GroupIcon) properly display next to section headers
Mobile bottom nav correctly shows 5 key items: Dashboard, Finances, Planning, Reports, Calc

context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation restructure verified. Personal mode has 6 sections (Dashboard, Finances, Planning, Reports, Calculators, Settings). Adviser mode has 7 sections (adds Clients). Mobile bottom nav shows 5 items. Important: An 'Important Information' modal appears on first load requiring user to click 'I Understand & Accept' - this blocks interactions until dismissed. Mode switching works via localStorage key 'app_mode' with values 'personal', 'adviser', or 'client'.
